For a tower to be inverted, if it was b7-b8-b9 (b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8), it should become b9-b8-b7 (b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on b8).

  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 4): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on b9
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 4): b11 on table, b12 on b11, b13 on b12, b14 on b13
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (clear b14)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 5): b15 on table, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17, b19 on b18
    (on-table b15)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (clear b19)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)

      (on b11 b12)
      (clear b11)

      (on-table b19)
      (on b18 b19)

  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    (on-table b1)
    (on b2 b1)
    (clear b2)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (clear b14)
    (on-table b15)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    (on-table b19)
    (on b20 b19)
    (on b3 b20)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (on-table b2)
      (on b1 b2)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
      (on-table b14)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (clear b15)
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b20 b3)
      (on b19 b20)
      (clear b19)
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 1): b4 on table
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 2): b5 on table, b6 on b5
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 2): b7 on table, b8 on b7
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 2): b9 on table, b10 on b9
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (clear b10)
    
    ;; Tower 8 (height 10): b11 on table, b12 on b11, ..., b20 on b19
    (on-table b11)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (clear b1)
      (on b1 b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (clear b2)
      (on b2 b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top
      (clear b3)
      (on b3 b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b4 on top
      (clear b4)
      (on b4 b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b5 on top (was on bottom with b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on-table b6)
      (clear b5)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b7 on top (was on bottom with b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on-table b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 7 inverted: b9 on top (was on bottom with b10)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on-table b10)
      (clear b9)
      
      ;; Tower 8 inverted: b11 on top (was on bottom)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b19 b20)
      (on-table b20)
      (clear b11)
      
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
